# Acacia Pappas

Software engineer. Former educator. Currently serving as interim CTO at Hope Street Group. I like building and creating. Tools of choice: words, languages, computers, story, pencil and paper, and more recently any number of large language models.

## About

This site is a personal engineering portfolio. It tracks questions I'm wrestling with, things I've figured out, and work that came out of it. 

## Writing

- From Educator to Engineer: How the I/Own It Scholarship Launched my Career in Tech (2018) — career transition from teaching to software engineering via Hack Reactor and Optimizely.
